verdict: AI displacement risk is moderate, with a potential for job replacement in some aspects of the role.

reasoning_steps.title: Task automation in document review
reasoning_steps.body: Tasks such as reviewing and analyzing legal documents, summarizing case law, and drafting memoranda can be automated using natural language processing (NLP) tools.

reasoning_steps.title: AI-assisted research
reasoning_steps.body: AI-powered research tools can help public defenders quickly find relevant case law, statutes, and regulations, reducing the time spent on research.

reasoning_steps.title: Negotiation of settlements
reasoning_steps.body: While AI can assist in negotiation, human judgment and empathy are still essential for resolving complex disputes and finding mutually beneficial solutions.

evidence_ledger.contribution: Tasks such as reviewing and analyzing legal documents can be automated using NLP tools.
AI-powered research tools can help public defenders quickly find relevant case law, statutes, and regulations.

adjacent_careers.name: Lawyer
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Both public defenders and lawyers represent clients in court, but lawyers have more flexibility in their practice areas and may work on a broader range of cases.

adjacent_careers.name: Social Worker
adjacent_careers.reasoning: Public defenders often work with social workers to understand the underlying issues affecting their clients' lives and develop strategies for resolving disputes.

recent_developments.headline: New AI-powered tool helps public defenders analyze case law
recent_developments.impact: This tool can help public defenders quickly find relevant case law, reducing the time spent on research.

recent_developments.headline: Anthropic Economic Index maps real AI usage across the workforce
recent_developments.impact: Use is concentrated in writing, coding, and analysis — physical and interpersonal work see far less AI involvement.
